welcomeText: Choose a language above, then join or create a room to start chatting in any of the supported languages.
hint: Enter your name and a room ID. Share the same room ID with friends to chat together.
typeRomanHint: Type in Roman letters (e.g. namaste); it converts to the selected language.
signLatinOnly: Sign view available for letters and numbers.
noMembersOnline: No members online in this room.
noMembersInRoom: No members in this room yet.
